name: Cup Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Thick milk is soured milk.
2. Scald thick milk by baking at 350°F for a few minutes; allow to remain long enough to set the curds. Drain off the water, put curds in an earthen vessel and keep at a moderately warm temperature (about 75°F).
3. Each day for a week, add new baked curds.
4. At the end of a week, pour curds into a heated pan and let simmer very slowly; bring to a slow boil without stirring.
5. Add a pinch of salt, baking soda dissolved in cream, and butter (1/2 lb). Stir the mixture and continue boiling for 15 minutes.
6. Add beaten eggs and pour mixture into small cheese cups.
